mapper.select: select id, user_id, name, measure_type, value1, value2, notes, happen_time, create_time, update_time from kh_user_measure_track where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into kh_user_measure_track (user_id, name, measure_type, value1, value2, notes, happen_time) values (#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{measureType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{value1,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{value2,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{notes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{happenTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update kh_user_measure_track set value1 = #{value1,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, value2 = #{value2,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, notes = #{notes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, happen_time = #{happenTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = now() where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
